underlying_goal: Add a second neural search model/index alongside the existing one in their recommendations service, with separate bootstrap scripts and environment variables, and get a detailed implementation plan saved as a reference document
friction_detail: Claude initially over-engineered the plan proposing an OpenSearch upgrade and complex architecture instead of a simple second model mirroring the first, and also incorrectly removed Figma MCP config from CI workflow when user only wanted the CI error fixed.
brief_summary: User wanted to add a second neural search model/index mirroring the first and save a detailed plan; Claude initially over-scoped but eventually produced a plan document, then got sidetracked fixing a CI workflow issue with mixed results.
